Container.Name: AllMightyDLP
Container.Overview: AllMightyDLP is a self-hosted yt-dlp link resolver. Paste a supported URL, inspect the source, and retrieve direct media links when the site exposes them.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the AllMightyDLP web interface. Unraid uses this mapped port for direct WebUI access from the Docker context menu.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent application data, temp workspace, optional cookies, and saved token secret

Config.Name: App Title
Config.Description: Visible app name in the web UI

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Optional public base URL used to render absolute download links

Config.Name: AppData Dir
Config.Description: Internal appdata path used for persistent state and generated secrets

Config.Name: FFmpeg Binary
Config.Description: FFmpeg binary used when a site needs extra processing before saving

Config.Name: Allow Playlists
Config.Description: Set to false to force single-item downloads only

Config.Name: Default Profile
Config.Description: Startup selection for the UI profile picker: video, audio, or original

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: Optional Basic Auth username to protect the web interface

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Optional Basic Auth password to protect the web interface

Config.Name: Cookie File
Config.Description: Optional path to a Netscape-format cookies.txt file for sites that require login access

Config.Name: Temp Directory
Config.Description: Temporary directory used while preparing downloads

Config.Name: Cleanup Age Minutes
Config.Description: How long finished jobs stay in memory before cleanup

Config.Name: Download Token Secret
Config.Description: Optional override for the download token secret. Leave blank to auto-generate and persist one under /config.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Unraid user id for future permission alignment

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Unraid group id for future permission alignment

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: File creation mask inside the container
